create proc dbo.dt_addtosourcecontrol
    @vchSourceSafeINI varchar(255) = '',
    @vchProjectName   varchar(255) ='',
    @vchComment       varchar(255) ='',
    @vchLoginName     varchar(255) ='',
    @vchPassword      varchar(255) =''

as

set nocount on

declare @iReturn int
declare @iObjectId int
select @iObjectId = 0

declare @iStreamObjectId int
select @iStreamObjectId = 0

declare @VSSGUID varchar(100)
select @VSSGUID = 'SQLVersionControl.VCS_SQL'

declare @vchDatabaseName varchar(255)
select @vchDatabaseName = db_name()

declare @iReturnValue int
select @iReturnValue = 0

declare @iPropertyObjectId int
declare @vchParentId varchar(255)

declare @iObjectCount int
select @iObjectCount = 0

    exec @iReturn = sp_OACreate @VSSGUID, @iObjectId OUT
    if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError


    /* Create Project in SS */
    exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iObjectId,
                                'AddProjectToSourceSafe',
                                NULL,
                                @vchSourceSafeINI,
                                @vchProjectName output,
                                @@SERVERNAME,
                                @vchDatabaseName,
                                @vchLoginName,
                                @vchPassword,
                                @vchComment


    if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError

    exec @iReturn = sp_OAGetProperty @iObjectId, 'GetStreamObject', @iStreamObjectId OUT

    if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError

    /* Set Database Properties */

    begin tran SetProperties

    /* add high level object */

    exec @iPropertyObjectId = dbo.dt_adduserobject_vcs 'VCSProjectID'

    select @vchParentId = CONVERT(varchar(255),@iPropertyObjectId)

    exec dbo.dt_setpropertybyid @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSProjectID', @vchParentId , NULL
    exec dbo.dt_setpropertybyid @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSProject' , @vchProjectName , NULL
    exec dbo.dt_setpropertybyid @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSourceSafeINI' , @vchSourceSafeINI , NULL
    exec dbo.dt_setpropertybyid @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLServer', @@SERVERNAME, NULL
    exec dbo.dt_setpropertybyid @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLDatabase', @vchDatabaseName, NULL

    if @@error <> 0 GOTO E_General_Error

    commit tran SetProperties

    declare cursorProcNames cursor for
        select convert(varchar(255), name) from sysobjects where type = 'P' and name not like 'dt_%'
    open cursorProcNames

    while 1 = 1
    begin
        declare @vchProcName varchar(255)
        fetch next from cursorProcNames into @vchProcName
        if @@fetch_status <> 0
            break

        select colid, text into #ProcLines
        from syscomments
        where id = object_id(@vchProcName)
        order by colid

        declare @iCurProcLine int
        declare @iProcLines int
        select @iCurProcLine = 1
        select @iProcLines = (select count(*) from #ProcLines)
        while @iCurProcLine <= @iProcLines
        begin
            declare @pos int
            select @pos = 1
            declare @iCurLineSize int
            select @iCurLineSize = len((select text from #ProcLines where colid = @iCurProcLine))
            while @pos <= @iCurLineSize
            begin
                declare @vchProcLinePiece varchar(255)
                select @vchProcLinePiece = convert(varchar(255),
                    substring((select text from #ProcLines where colid = @iCurProcLine),
                              @pos, 255 ))
                exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iStreamObjectId, 'AddStream', @iReturnValue OUT, @vchProcLinePiece
                if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError
                select @pos = @pos + 255
            end
            select @iCurProcLine = @iCurProcLine + 1
        end
        drop table #ProcLines

        exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iObjectId,
                                    'CheckIn_StoredProcedure',
                                    NULL,
                                    @sProjectName = @vchProjectName,
                                    @sSourceSafeINI = @vchSourceSafeINI,
                                    @sServerName = @@SERVERNAME,
                                    @sDatabaseName = @vchDatabaseName,
                                    @sObjectName = @vchProcName,
                                    @sComment = @vchComment,
                                    @sLoginName = @vchLoginName,
                                    @sPassword = @vchPassword,
                                    @iVCSFlags = 0,
                                    @iActionFlag = 0,
                                    @sStream = ''

        if @iReturn = 0 select @iObjectCount = @iObjectCount + 1

    end

CleanUp:
	close cursorProcNames
	deallocate cursorProcNames
    select @vchProjectName
    select @iObjectCount
    return

E_General_Error:
    /* this is an all or nothing.  No specific error messages */
    goto CleanUp

E_OAError:
    exec dbo.dt_displayoaerror @iObjectId, @iReturn
    goto CleanUp

/*
**	Add an object to the dtproperties table
*/
create procedure dbo.dt_adduserobject
as
	set nocount on
	/*
	** Create the user object if it does not exist already
	*/
	begin transaction
		insert dbo.dtproperties (property) VALUES ('DtgSchemaOBJECT')
		update dbo.dtproperties set objectid=@@identity 
			where id=@@identity and property='DtgSchemaOBJECT'
	commit
	return @@identity

create procedure dbo.dt_adduserobject_vcs
    @vchProperty varchar(64)

as

set nocount on

declare @iReturn int
    /*
    ** Create the user object if it does not exist already
    */
    begin transaction
        select @iReturn = objectid from dbo.dtproperties where property = @vchProperty
        if @iReturn IS NULL
        begin
            insert dbo.dtproperties (property) VALUES (@vchProperty)
            update dbo.dtproperties set objectid=@@identity
                    where id=@@identity and property=@vchProperty
            select @iReturn = @@identity
        end
    commit
    return @iReturn

create proc dbo.dt_checkinobject
    @chObjectType  char(4),
    @vchObjectName varchar(255),
    @vchComment    varchar(255)='',
    @vchLoginName  varchar(255),
    @vchPassword   varchar(255)='',
    @iVCSFlags     int = 0,
    @iActionFlag   int = 0,   /* 0 => AddFile, 1 => CheckIn */
    @txStream1     Text = '', /* There is a bug that if items are NULL they do not pass to OLE servers */
    @txStream2     Text = '',
    @txStream3     Text = ''


as

set nocount on

declare @iReturn int
declare @iObjectId int
select @iObjectId = 0

declare @VSSGUID varchar(100)
select @VSSGUID = 'SQLVersionControl.VCS_SQL'


declare @iPropertyObjectId int
select @iPropertyObjectId  = 0

    select @iPropertyObjectId = (select objectid from dbo.dtproperties where property = 'VCSProjectID')

    declare @vchProjectName   varchar(255)
    declare @vchSourceSafeINI varchar(255)
    declare @vchServerName    varchar(255)
    declare @vchDatabaseName  varchar(255)
    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSProject',       @vchProjectName   OUT
    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSourceSafeINI', @vchSourceSafeINI OUT
    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLServer',     @vchServerName    OUT
    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLDatabase',   @vchDatabaseName  OUT

    if @chObjectType = 'PROC'
    begin
        if @iActionFlag = 1
        begin
            /* Procedure Can have up to three streams
            Drop Stream, Create Stream, GRANT stream */

            begin tran compile_all

            /* try to compile the streams */
            exec (@txStream1)
            if @@error <> 0 GOTO E_Compile_Fail

            exec (@txStream2)
            if @@error <> 0 GOTO E_Compile_Fail

            exec (@txStream3)
            if @@error <> 0 GOTO E_Compile_Fail
        end

        exec @iReturn = sp_OACreate @VSSGUID, @iObjectId OUT
        if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError

        if @iActionFlag = 1
        begin
            exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iObjectId,
                                        'CheckIn_StoredProcedure',
                                        NULL,
                                        @sProjectName = @vchProjectName,
                                        @sSourceSafeINI = @vchSourceSafeINI,
                                        @sServerName = @vchServerName,
                                        @sDatabaseName = @vchDatabaseName,
                                        @sObjectName = @vchObjectName,
                                        @sComment = @vchComment,
                                        @sLoginName = @vchLoginName,
                                        @sPassword = @vchPassword,
                                        @iVCSFlags = @iVCSFlags,
                                        @iActionFlag = @iActionFlag,
                                        @sStream = @txStream2
        end
        else
        begin
            declare @iStreamObjectId int
            declare @iReturnValue int

            exec @iReturn = sp_OAGetProperty @iObjectId, 'GetStreamObject', @iStreamObjectId OUT
            if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError

            select colid, text into #ProcLines
            from syscomments
            where id = object_id(@vchObjectName)
            order by colid

            declare @iCurProcLine int
            declare @iProcLines int
            select @iCurProcLine = 1
            select @iProcLines = (select count(*) from #ProcLines)
            while @iCurProcLine <= @iProcLines
            begin
                declare @pos int
                select @pos = 1
                declare @iCurLineSize int
                select @iCurLineSize = len((select text from #ProcLines where colid = @iCurProcLine))
                while @pos <= @iCurLineSize
                begin
                    declare @vchProcLinePiece varchar(255)
                    select @vchProcLinePiece = convert(varchar(255),
                        substring((select text from #ProcLines where colid = @iCurProcLine),
                                  @pos, 255 ))
                    exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iStreamObjectId, 'AddStream', @iReturnValue OUT, @vchProcLinePiece
                    if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError
                    select @pos = @pos + 255
                end
                select @iCurProcLine = @iCurProcLine + 1
            end
            drop table #ProcLines

            exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iObjectId,
                                        'CheckIn_StoredProcedure',
                                        NULL,
                                        @sProjectName = @vchProjectName,
                                        @sSourceSafeINI = @vchSourceSafeINI,
                                        @sServerName = @vchServerName,
                                        @sDatabaseName = @vchDatabaseName,
                                        @sObjectName = @vchObjectName,
                                        @sComment = @vchComment,
                                        @sLoginName = @vchLoginName,
                                        @sPassword = @vchPassword,
                                        @iVCSFlags = @iVCSFlags,
                                        @iActionFlag = @iActionFlag,
                                        @sStream = ''
        end

        if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError

        if @iActionFlag = 1
        begin
            commit tran compile_all
            if @@error <> 0 GOTO E_Compile_Fail
        end

    end

CleanUp:
    return

E_Compile_Fail:
    declare @lerror int
    select @lerror = @@error
    rollback tran compile_all
    RAISERROR (@lerror,16,-1)
    goto CleanUp

E_OAError:
    if @iActionFlag = 1 rollback tran compile_all
    exec dbo.dt_displayoaerror @iObjectId, @iReturn
    goto CleanUp

create proc dbo.dt_checkoutobject
    @chObjectType  char(4),
    @vchObjectName varchar(255),
    @vchComment    varchar(255),
    @vchLoginName  varchar(255),
    @vchPassword   varchar(255),
    @iVCSFlags     int = 0,
    @iActionFlag   int = 0/* 0 => Checkout, 1 => GetLatest, 2 => UndoCheckOut */

as

set nocount on

declare @iReturn int
declare @iObjectId int
select @iObjectId =0

declare @VSSGUID varchar(100)
select @VSSGUID = 'SQLVersionControl.VCS_SQL'

declare @iReturnValue int
select @iReturnValue = 0

declare @vchTempText varchar(255)

/* this is for our strings */
declare @iStreamObjectId int
select @iStreamObjectId = 0

    declare @iPropertyObjectId int
    select @iPropertyObjectId = (select objectid from dbo.dtproperties where property = 'VCSProjectID')

    declare @vchProjectName   varchar(255)
    declare @vchSourceSafeINI varchar(255)
    declare @vchServerName    varchar(255)
    declare @vchDatabaseName  varchar(255)
    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSProject',       @vchProjectName   OUT
    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSourceSafeINI', @vchSourceSafeINI OUT
    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLServer',     @vchServerName    OUT
    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLDatabase',   @vchDatabaseName  OUT

    if @chObjectType = 'PROC'
    begin
        /* Procedure Can have up to three streams
           Drop Stream, Create Stream, GRANT stream */

        exec @iReturn = sp_OACreate @VSSGUID, @iObjectId OUT

        if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError

        exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iObjectId,
                                    'CheckOut_StoredProcedure',
                                    NULL,
                                    @sProjectName = @vchProjectName,
                                    @sSourceSafeINI = @vchSourceSafeINI,
                                    @sObjectName = @vchObjectName,
                                    @sServerName = @vchServerName,
                                    @sDatabaseName = @vchDatabaseName,
                                    @sComment = @vchComment,
                                    @sLoginName = @vchLoginName,
                                    @sPassword = @vchPassword,
                                    @iVCSFlags = @iVCSFlags,
                                    @iActionFlag = @iActionFlag

        if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError


        exec @iReturn = sp_OAGetProperty @iObjectId, 'GetStreamObject', @iStreamObjectId OUT

        if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError

        create table #commenttext (id int identity, sourcecode varchar(255))


        select @vchTempText = 'STUB'
        while @vchTempText IS NOT NULL
        begin
            exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iStreamObjectId, 'GetStream', @iReturnValue OUT, @vchTempText OUT
            if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError

            if (@vchTempText IS NOT NULL) insert into #commenttext (sourcecode) select @vchTempText
        end

        select 'VCS'=sourcecode from #commenttext order by id
        select 'SQL'=text from syscomments where id = object_id(@vchObjectName) order by colid

    end

CleanUp:
    return

E_OAError:
    exec dbo.dt_displayoaerror @iObjectId, @iReturn
    GOTO CleanUp

    @vchObjectName nvarchar(255),

    @vchPassword   nvarchar(255),
    @iVCSFlags     int = 0,
    @iActionFlag   int = 0/* 0 => Checkout, 1 => GetLatest, 2 => UndoCheckOut */

select @iObjectId =0

declare @VSSGUID nvarchar(100)
select @VSSGUID = N'SQLVersionControl.VCS_SQL'

declare @iReturnValue int
select @iReturnValue = 0

    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs_u @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSProject',       @vchProjectName   OUT
    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs_u @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSourceSafeINI', @vchSourceSafeINI OUT
    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs_u @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLServer',     @vchServerName    OUT
    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs_u @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLDatabase',   @vchDatabaseName  OUT

    if @chObjectType = 'PROC'
    begin
        /* Procedure Can have up to three streams
           Drop Stream, Create Stream, GRANT stream */

        exec @iReturn = sp_OACreate @VSSGUID, @iObjectId OUT

        if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError

        exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iObjectId,
                                    N'CheckOut_StoredProcedure',
                                    NULL,
                                    @sProjectName = @vchProjectName,
                                    @sSourceSafeINI = @vchSourceSafeINI,
                                    @sObjectName = @vchObjectName,
                                    @sServerName = @vchServerName,
                                    @sDatabaseName = @vchDatabaseName,
                                    @sComment = @vchComment,
                                    @sLoginName = @vchLoginName,
                                    @sPassword = @vchPassword,
                                    @iVCSFlags = @iVCSFlags,
                                    @iActionFlag = @iActionFlag

        if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError


        exec @iReturn = sp_OAGetProperty @iObjectId, N'GetStreamObject', @iStreamObjectId OUT

        if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError

        create table #commenttext (id int identity, sourcecode nvarchar(255))


        select @vchTempText = N'STUB'
        while @vchTempText IS NOT NULL
        begin
            exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iStreamObjectId, N'GetStream', @iReturnValue OUT, @vchTempText OUT
            if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError

            if (@vchTempText IS NOT NULL) insert into #commenttext (sourcecode) select @vchTempText
        end

        select N'VCS'=sourcecode from #commenttext order by id
        select N'SQL'=text from syscomments where id = object_id(@vchObjectName) order by colid

    end

CleanUp:
    return

E_OAError:
    exec dbo.dt_displayoaerror_u @iObjectId, @iReturn
    GOTO CleanUp

**	Drop one or all the associated properties of an object or an attribute 
**
**	dt_dropproperties objid, null or '' -- drop all properties of the object itself
**	dt_dropproperties objid, property -- drop the property
*/
create procedure dbo.dt_droppropertiesbyid
	@id int,
	@property varchar(64)
as
	set nocount on

	if (@property is null) or (@property = '')
		delete from dbo.dtproperties where objectid=@id
	else
		delete from dbo.dtproperties 
			where objectid=@id and property=@property

/* 
**	Generate an ansi name that is unique in the dtproperties.value column 
*/ 
create procedure dbo.dt_generateansiname(@name varchar(255) output) 
as 
	declare @prologue varchar(20) 
	declare @indexstring varchar(20) 
	declare @index integer 
 
	set @prologue = 'MSDT-A-' 
	set @index = 1 
 
	while 1 = 1 
	begin 
		set @indexstring = cast(@index as varchar(20)) 
		set @name = @prologue + @indexstring 
		if not exists (select value from dtproperties where value = @name) 
			break 
		 
		set @index = @index + 1 
 
		if (@index = 10000) 
			goto TooMany 
	end 
 
Leave: 
 
	return 
 
TooMany: 
 
	set @name = 'DIAGRAM' 
	goto Leave

    @vchLoginName varchar(255) = '',
    @vchPassword  varchar(255) = '',
    @iWhoToo      int = 0 /* 0 => Just check project; 1 => get list of objs */

as

set nocount on

declare @iReturn int
declare @iObjectId int
select @iObjectId = 0

declare @VSSGUID varchar(100)
select @VSSGUID = 'SQLVersionControl.VCS_SQL'

declare @iReturnValue int
select @iReturnValue = 0

declare @iStreamObjectId int
select @iStreamObjectId   = 0

declare @vchTempText varchar(255)

    declare @iPropertyObjectId int
    select @iPropertyObjectId = (select objectid from dbo.dtproperties where property = 'VCSProjectID')

    declare @vchProjectName   varchar(255)
    declare @vchSourceSafeINI varchar(255)
    declare @vchServerName    varchar(255)
    declare @vchDatabaseName  varchar(255)
    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSProject',       @vchProjectName   OUT
    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSourceSafeINI', @vchSourceSafeINI OUT
    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLServer',     @vchServerName    OUT
    exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLDatabase',   @vchDatabaseName  OUT

    if (@vchProjectName IS NULL) or (@vchSourceSafeINI  IS NULL) or (@vchServerName IS NULL) or (@vchDatabaseName IS NULL)
    begin
        RAISERROR('Not Under Source Control',16,-1)
        return
    end

    if @iWhoToo = 1
    begin

        /* Get List of Procs in the project */
        exec @iReturn = sp_OACreate @VSSGUID, @iObjectId OUT
        if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError

        exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iObjectId,
                                    'GetListOfObjects',
                                    NULL,
                                    @vchProjectName,
                                    @vchSourceSafeINI,
                                    @vchServerName,
                                    @vchDatabaseName,
                                    @vchLoginName,
                                    @vchPassword

        if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError

        exec @iReturn = sp_OAGetProperty @iObjectId, 'GetStreamObject', @iStreamObjectId OUT

        if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError

        create table #ObjectList (id int identity, vchObjectlist varchar(255))

        select @vchTempText = 'STUB'
        while @vchTempText IS NOT NULL
        begin
            exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iStreamObjectId, 'GetStream', @iReturnValue OUT, @vchTempText OUT
            if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError

            if (@vchTempText IS NOT NULL) insert into #ObjectList (vchObjectlist ) select @vchTempText
        end

        select vchObjectlist from #ObjectList order by id
    end

CleanUp:
    return

E_OAError:
    exec dbo.dt_displayoaerror @iObjectId, @iReturn
    goto CleanUp

/*
**	If the property already exists, reset the value; otherwise add property
**		id -- the id in sysobjects of the object
**		property -- the name of the property
**		value -- the text value of the property
**		lvalue -- the binary value of the property (image)
*/
create procedure dbo.dt_setpropertybyid
	@id int,
	@property varchar(64),
	@value varchar(255),
	@lvalue image
as
	set nocount on
	declare @uvalue nvarchar(255) 
	set @uvalue = convert(nvarchar(255), @value) 
	if exists (select * from dbo.dtproperties 
			where objectid=@id and property=@property)
	begin
		--
		-- bump the version count for this row as we update it
		--
		update dbo.dtproperties set value=@value, uvalue=@uvalue, lvalue=@lvalue, version=version+1
			where objectid=@id and property=@property
	end
	else
	begin
		--
		-- version count is auto-set to 0 on initial insert
		--
		insert dbo.dtproperties (property, objectid, value, uvalue, lvalue)
			values (@property, @id, @value, @uvalue, @lvalue)
	end

/*
**	If the property already exists, reset the value; otherwise add property
**		id -- the id in sysobjects of the object
**		property -- the name of the property
**		uvalue -- the text value of the property
**		lvalue -- the binary value of the property (image)
*/
create procedure dbo.dt_setpropertybyid_u
	@id int,
	@property varchar(64),
	@uvalue nvarchar(255),
	@lvalue image
as
	set nocount on
	-- 
	-- If we are writing the name property, find the ansi equivalent. 
	-- If there is no lossless translation, generate an ansi name. 
	-- 
	declare @avalue varchar(255) 
	set @avalue = null 
	if (@uvalue is not null) 
	begin 
		if (convert(nvarchar(255), convert(varchar(255), @uvalue)) = @uvalue) 
		begin 
			set @avalue = convert(varchar(255), @uvalue) 
		end 
		else 
		begin 
			if 'DtgSchemaNAME' = @property 
			begin 
				exec dbo.dt_generateansiname @avalue output 
			end 
		end 
	end 
	if exists (select * from dbo.dtproperties 
			where objectid=@id and property=@property)
	begin
		--
		-- bump the version count for this row as we update it
		--
		update dbo.dtproperties set value=@avalue, uvalue=@uvalue, lvalue=@lvalue, version=version+1
			where objectid=@id and property=@property
	end
	else
	begin
		--
		-- version count is auto-set to 0 on initial insert
		--
		insert dbo.dtproperties (property, objectid, value, uvalue, lvalue)
			values (@property, @id, @avalue, @uvalue, @lvalue)
	end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[NewItemsTrans] AS
SELECT     Item_ID, ItemCode, ItemName, Total, Item_Discount, (Total - Item_Discount) AS ItemNet, Transaction_Type, SumQuantity
FROM         (SELECT     Item_ID, ItemCode, ItemName, Transaction_Type, SUM(Total1) AS Total, SUM(Item_Discount1) AS Item_Discount, SUM(Quantity) 
                                              AS SumQuantity
                        FROM         (SELECT     ItemsTrans.Item_ID, ItemsTrans.ItemCode, ItemsTrans.ItemName, (Quantity * Price) AS Total1, 
                                                                      'Item_Discount1' = CASE WHEN ItemDiscountType = 1 OR
                                                                      ItemDiscountType = 0 THEN 0 WHEN ItemDiscountType = 2 THEN (ItemDiscount) 
                                                                      WHEN ItemDiscountType = 3 THEN ((Quantity * Price) * (ItemDiscount / 100)) END, ItemsTrans.Transaction_Type, 
                                                                      ItemsTrans.Quantity
                                                FROM         ItemsTrans
                                                WHERE     Transaction_Type = 2) XTable
                        GROUP BY Item_ID, ItemCode, ItemName, Transaction_Type) YTable

CREATE PROC [dbo].[Rebuild_ContractRevenue_ForPeriod]
(
    @StartDate date,
    @EndDate   date
)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    IF @EndDate < @StartDate
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(N'EndDate لا يمكن أن يكون قبل StartDate',16,1);
        RETURN;
    END

    DECLARE @GlobalStart date = @StartDate;
    DECLARE @GlobalEnd   date = @EndDate;

    ---------------------------------------------------
    -- 1) مسح التوزيعات داخل الفترة من Details1
    ---------------------------------------------------
    DELETE FROM dbo.TblContractInsAllocationsDetails1
    WHERE Installdate >= @GlobalStart
      AND Installdate <= @GlobalEnd;

    ---------------------------------------------------
    -- 2) لف على الشهور من أول الفترة لآخرها
    ---------------------------------------------------
    DECLARE @CurrentMonth date = DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(@GlobalStart), MONTH(@GlobalStart), 1);
    DECLARE @LastMonth    date = DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(@GlobalEnd),   MONTH(@GlobalEnd),   1);

    WHILE @CurrentMonth <= @LastMonth
    BEGIN
        DECLARE @FirstOfMonth date = @CurrentMonth;
        DECLARE @LastOfMonth  date = EOMONTH(@CurrentMonth);

        IF @FirstOfMonth < @GlobalStart SET @FirstOfMonth = @GlobalStart;
        IF @LastOfMonth  > @GlobalEnd   SET @LastOfMonth  = @GlobalEnd;

        ------------------------------------------------
        -- 3) TransID للشهر الحالي (لو مش موجود نخليه NULL)
        ------------------------------------------------
        DECLARE @TransID int = NULL;

        SELECT TOP 1 @TransID = TransID
        FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocations
        WHERE MONTH(FromDate) = MONTH(@CurrentMonth)
          AND YEAR(FromDate)  = YEAR(@CurrentMonth);

        ------------------------------------------------
        -- 4) تجهيز الأقساط:
        --    أ) أقساط اتعملها استحقاق سابق (Details)
        --    ب) + أول دفعة من كل عقد (لو مش متعملها استحقاق سابق)
        ------------------------------------------------
        ;WITH AllocatedInstallments AS
        (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                I.Id          AS InstallId,
                I.ContNo,
                I.InstallNo,
                I.Installdate AS StartDate,
                I.Countsofall,
                I.NoteSerial1,
                C.CusID,
                I.installValue,      -- ✅ مهم
                I.NetRent,
                I.RentValue,
                I.Commissions,
                I.Insurance,
                I.Water,
                I.Electric,
                I.TelandNet
            FROM dbo.TblContractInsAllocationsDetails D
            INNER JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments I
                ON I.Id = D.Installid
            INNER JOIN dbo.TblContract C
                ON C.ContNo = I.ContNo
        ),
        FirstInstallments AS
        (
            SELECT 
                X.InstallId,
                X.ContNo,
                X.InstallNo,
                X.StartDate,
                X.Countsofall,
                X.NoteSerial1,
                X.CusID,
                X.installValue,      -- ✅ مهم
                X.NetRent,
                X.RentValue,
                X.Commissions,
                X.Insurance,
                X.Water,
                X.Electric,
                X.TelandNet
            FROM
            (
                SELECT 
                    I.Id          AS InstallId,
                    I.ContNo,
                    I.InstallNo,
                    I.Installdate AS StartDate,
                    I.Countsofall,
                    I.NoteSerial1,
                    C.CusID,
                    I.installValue,    -- ✅ مهم
                    I.NetRent,
                    I.RentValue,
                    I.Commissions,
                    I.Insurance,
                    I.Water,
                    I.Electric,
                    I.TelandNet,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY I.ContNo ORDER BY I.Installdate, I.InstallNo) AS RN
                FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments I
                INNER JOIN dbo.TblContract C
                    ON C.ContNo = I.ContNo
            ) X
            WHERE X.RN = 1
              AND NOT EXISTS
              (
                  SELECT 1
                  FROM dbo.TblContractInsAllocationsDetails D
                  WHERE D.Installid = X.InstallId
              )
        ),
        AllInstallments AS
        (
            SELECT 
                A.InstallId,
                A.ContNo,
                A.InstallNo,
                A.StartDate,
                A.Countsofall,
                A.NoteSerial1,
                A.CusID,
                A.installValue,
                A.NetRent,
                A.RentValue,
                A.Commissions,
                A.Insurance,
                A.Water,
                A.Electric,
                A.TelandNet,
                C.EndDate AS ContractEndDate
            FROM
            (
                SELECT * FROM AllocatedInstallments
                UNION ALL
                SELECT * FROM FirstInstallments
            ) A
            INNER JOIN dbo.TblContract C
                ON C.ContNo = A.ContNo
        ),
        BasePeriod AS
        (
            SELECT
                A.*,
                NI.NextInstallStart,

				--Select NetRent,RentValue,* from TblContractInstallments where RentValue <> NetRent

    --            CASE 
    --                WHEN ISNULL(A.NetRent,0) <> 0 THEN ISNULL(A.NetRent,0)
    --                ELSE ISNULL(A.RentValue,0)
                ISNULL(A.RentValue,0) AS EffectiveRent,

                CASE
                    WHEN NI.NextInstallStart IS NOT NULL
                        THEN DATEADD(DAY,-1, NI.NextInstallStart)
                    WHEN A.ContractEndDate IS NOT NULL
                        THEN A.ContractEndDate
                    WHEN ISNULL(A.Countsofall,0) > 0
                        THEN DATEADD(DAY,-1, DATEADD(MONTH, A.Countsofall, A.StartDate))
                    ELSE A.StartDate
                END AS EndDate
            FROM AllInstallments A
            OUTER APPLY
            (
                SELECT MIN(I2.Installdate) AS NextInstallStart
                FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments I2
                WHERE I2.ContNo      = A.ContNo
                  AND I2.Installdate > A.StartDate
            ) NI
        ),
        WithPosted AS
        (
            SELECT
                B.*,

                ISNULL(P.PostedTotal,0)    AS PostedTotal,
                ISNULL(P.PostedRent,0)     AS PostedRent,
                ISNULL(P.PostedComm,0)     AS PostedComm,
                ISNULL(P.PostedIns,0)      AS PostedIns,
                ISNULL(P.PostedWater,0)    AS PostedWater,
                ISNULL(P.PostedElectric,0) AS PostedElectric,
                ISNULL(P.PostedTeland,0)   AS PostedTeland,
                P.PostedThroughDate,

                CASE
                    WHEN P.PostedThroughDate IS NOT NULL THEN DATEADD(DAY, 1, P.PostedThroughDate)
                    ELSE B.StartDate
                END AS RemainingStart,

                -- ✅ TotalValue من الدفعة فقط (وبديلها installValue لو البنود صفر)
                CASE 
                    WHEN (
                        ISNULL(B.EffectiveRent,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.Commissions,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.Water,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.Electric,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.TelandNet,0)
                    ) > 0
                    THEN (
                        ISNULL(B.EffectiveRent,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.Commissions,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.Water,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.Electric,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.TelandNet,0)
                    )
                    ELSE ISNULL(B.installValue,0)
                END AS TotalValue
            FROM BasePeriod B
            OUTER APPLY
            (
                SELECT
                    PostedThroughDate = MAX(EOMONTH(D2.Installdate)),
                    PostedTotal    = SUM(ISNULL(D2.installValue,0)),
                    PostedRent     = SUM(ISNULL(D2.RentValue,0)),
                    PostedComm     = SUM(ISNULL(D2.Commissions,0)),
                    PostedIns      = SUM(ISNULL(D2.Insurance,0)),
                    PostedWater    = SUM(ISNULL(D2.Water,0)),
                    PostedElectric = SUM(ISNULL(D2.Electric,0)),
                    PostedTeland   = SUM(ISNULL(D2.TelandNet,0))
                FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails2 D2
                WHERE D2.Installid = B.InstallId
                  AND D2.Installdate >= B.StartDate
                  AND D2.Installdate <= B.EndDate
            ) P
        ),
        FinalPeriods AS
        (
            SELECT
                I.*,

                -- ✅ استبعاد أي دفعة قيمتها = 0 (ممنوع اختراع قيم)
                CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL(I.TotalValue,0) <= 0 THEN 0
                    WHEN I.EndDate IS NULL THEN 0
                    WHEN I.RemainingStart > I.EndDate THEN 0
                    ELSE DATEDIFF(DAY, I.RemainingStart, I.EndDate) + 1
                END AS RemainingDays,

                CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL(I.TotalValue,0) <= 0 THEN 0
                    WHEN (I.TotalValue - I.PostedTotal) < 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (I.TotalValue - I.PostedTotal)
                END AS RemainingTotal,

                CASE WHEN (ISNULL(I.EffectiveRent,0) - I.PostedRent) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE (ISNULL(I.EffectiveRent,0) - I.PostedRent) END AS RemainingRent,
                CASE WHEN (ISNULL(I.Commissions,0)   - I.PostedComm) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE (ISNULL(I.Commissions,0)   - I.PostedComm) END AS RemainingComm,
                0 AS RemainingIns,
                CASE WHEN (ISNULL(I.Water,0)         - I.PostedWater)< 0 THEN 0 ELSE (ISNULL(I.Water,0)         - I.PostedWater)END AS RemainingWater,
                CASE WHEN (ISNULL(I.Electric,0)      - I.PostedElectric) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE (ISNULL(I.Electric,0)  - I.PostedElectric) END AS RemainingElectric,
                CASE WHEN (ISNULL(I.TelandNet,0)     - I.PostedTeland) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE (ISNULL(I.TelandNet,0)   - I.PostedTeland) END AS RemainingTeland
            FROM WithPosted I
        ),
        Overlapping AS
        (
            SELECT *
            FROM FinalPeriods I
            WHERE I.EndDate IS NOT NULL
              AND I.RemainingDays > 0
              AND I.RemainingTotal > 0     -- ✅ لازم يبقى في فلوس فعلًا
              AND I.RemainingStart <= @LastOfMonth
              AND I.EndDate        >= @FirstOfMonth
        ),
        MonthPortions AS
        (
            SELECT
                I.*,
                CASE 
                    WHEN I.RemainingStart > @FirstOfMonth THEN I.RemainingStart
                    ELSE @FirstOfMonth
                END AS PeriodStart,
                CASE
                    WHEN I.EndDate < @LastOfMonth THEN I.EndDate
                    ELSE @LastOfMonth
                END AS PeriodEnd
            FROM Overlapping I
        )
        INSERT INTO dbo.TblContractInsAllocationsDetails1
        (
            TransID,
            InstallNo,
            NoteSerial,
            Installid,
            Installdate,
            InstalldateH,
            CusID,
            installValue,
            RentValue,
            Commissions,
            Insurance,
            Water,
            Electric,
            TelandNet,
            allocations,
            Countsofall,
            Doneofall
        )
        SELECT
            @TransID                                       AS TransID,
            M.InstallNo,
            M.NoteSerial1                                  AS NoteSerial,
            M.InstallId                                    AS Installid,
            M.PeriodStart                                  AS Installdate,
            CONVERT(varchar(10), M.PeriodStart, 131)       AS InstalldateH,
            M.CusID,

            ROUND( (M.RemainingTotal / M.RemainingDays) * (DATEDIFF(DAY, M.PeriodStart, M.PeriodEnd) + 1), 2 ) AS installValue,

            ROUND( (M.RemainingRent  / M.RemainingDays) * (DATEDIFF(DAY, M.PeriodStart, M.PeriodEnd) + 1), 2 ) AS RentValue,
            ROUND( (M.RemainingComm  / M.RemainingDays) * (DATEDIFF(DAY, M.PeriodStart, M.PeriodEnd) + 1), 2 ) AS Commissions,
            0 AS Insurance,
            ROUND( (M.RemainingWater / M.RemainingDays) * (DATEDIFF(DAY, M.PeriodStart, M.PeriodEnd) + 1), 2 ) AS Water,
            ROUND( (M.RemainingElectric / M.RemainingDays) * (DATEDIFF(DAY, M.PeriodStart, M.PeriodEnd) + 1), 2 ) AS Electric,
            ROUND( (M.RemainingTeland / M.RemainingDays) * (DATEDIFF(DAY, M.PeriodStart, M.PeriodEnd) + 1), 2 ) AS TelandNet,

            0                                             AS allocations,
            M.Countsofall,
            0                                             AS Doneofall
        FROM MonthPortions M
        WHERE DATEDIFF(DAY, M.PeriodStart, M.PeriodEnd) + 1 > 0
          AND M.RemainingDays > 0
          AND M.RemainingTotal > 0;

        SET @CurrentMonth = DATEADD(MONTH, 1, @CurrentMonth);
    END
END

/* =========================================================
   Rpt_ContractRevenueDetails  (FIXED OpeningBalanceDate + GLTotalsBefore)
   ========================================================= */
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[Rpt_ContractRevenueDetails]
    @FromDate   DATETIME = NULL,
    @ToDate     DATETIME = NULL,
    @BranchId   INT      = NULL,
    @AqarTypeId INT      = NULL,
    @ClientId   INT      = NULL,
    @OwnerId    INT      = NULL,
    @ContractNo INT      = NULL
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @ToDateEnd DATETIME = CASE WHEN @ToDate IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE DATEADD(DAY,1,@ToDate) END;
    DECLARE @FromDateMinus1 DATETIME = CASE WHEN @FromDate IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE DATEADD(DAY,-1,@FromDate) END;

    /* ✅ FIX: OpeningBalanceDate = أول سنة بالنظام (IsFirstYear=1) + fallback */
    DECLARE @OpeningBalanceDate DATETIME =
    (
        SELECT MIN(datesatrt)
        FROM dbo.TblyearsData
        WHERE ISNULL(IsFirstYear,0) = 1
    );

    IF @OpeningBalanceDate IS NULL
        SELECT @OpeningBalanceDate = MIN(datesatrt) FROM dbo.TblyearsData;

    ;WITH
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 1) إجمالى قيمة العقد (Net بدون تأمين)
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    InstallAgg AS (
        SELECT ContNo,
               SUM(ISNULL(installValue,0) - ISNULL(Insurance,0)) AS TotalContract
        FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments
        GROUP BY ContNo
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 2) أول قسط لكل عقد (Fallback)
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    FirstInstallPerContract AS (
        SELECT ContNo, MIN(Installdate) AS FirstInstDate
        FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments
        GROUP BY ContNo
    ),
    FirstInstallFallback AS (
        SELECT
            c.ContNo,
            fi.Id AS InstallId,
            fi.Installdate,
            (ISNULL(fi.installValue,0) - ISNULL(fi.Insurance,0)) AS installValue
        FROM dbo.TblContract c
        JOIN FirstInstallPerContract fp ON fp.ContNo = c.ContNo
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments fi
             ON fi.ContNo = fp.ContNo
            AND fi.Installdate = fp.FirstInstDate
        LEFT JOIN dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails d ON d.InstallId = fi.Id
        WHERE ISNULL(c.NoteID,0) <> 0
          AND d.InstallId IS NULL
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 3) مصدر المستحق (Net بدون تأمين)
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    DueBase AS (
        SELECT
            i.ContNo,
            d.InstallId,
            d.Installdate,
            (ISNULL(d.installValue,0) - ISNULL(d.Insurance,0)) AS installValue
        FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails d
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i ON d.InstallId = i.Id

        UNION ALL

        SELECT
            f.ContNo,
            f.InstallId,
            f.Installdate,
            f.installValue
        FROM FirstInstallFallback f
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 4) مصدر الإيراد (Net بدون تأمين)
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    RevBase AS (
        SELECT
            i.ContNo,
            d.Installid AS InstallId,
            d.Installdate,
            (ISNULL(d.installValue,0) - ISNULL(d.Insurance,0)) AS installValue
        FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails2 d
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i ON d.Installid = i.Id
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 5) الأقساط “الصالحة”
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    ValidInstallments AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT InstallId FROM DueBase
        UNION
        SELECT DISTINCT InstallId FROM RevBase
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 6) الأقساط داخل الفترة (أساس التفصيلي)
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    --InstallmentsInRange AS (
    --    SELECT i.Id AS InstallId, i.ContNo
    --    FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments i
    --    JOIN ValidInstallments v ON v.InstallId = i.Id
    --    WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR i.Installdate >= @FromDate)
    --      AND (@ToDate   IS NULL OR i.Installdate <= @ToDate)
    --),



	InstallmentsInRange AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.InstallId, d.ContNo
    FROM DueBase d
    WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR d.Installdate >= @FromDate)
      AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR d.Installdate < @ToDateEnd)

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT r.InstallId, r.ContNo
    FROM RevBase r
    WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR r.Installdate >= @FromDate)
      AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR r.Installdate < @ToDateEnd)
),
ContractsInRange AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ContNo FROM InstallmentsInRange
),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 7) العقود التي لها أقساط داخل الفترة

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 8) Due Before / Period على مستوى القسط
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    DueBefore AS (
        SELECT d.InstallId, SUM(ISNULL(d.installValue,0)) AS DueBefore
        FROM DueBase d
        JOIN InstallmentsInRange ir ON ir.InstallId = d.InstallId
        WHERE @FromDate IS NOT NULL
          AND d.Installdate < @FromDate
        GROUP BY d.InstallId
    ),
    DuePeriod AS (
        SELECT d.InstallId, SUM(ISNULL(d.installValue,0)) AS DuePeriod
        FROM DueBase d
        JOIN InstallmentsInRange ir ON ir.InstallId = d.InstallId
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR d.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR d.Installdate < @ToDateEnd)
        GROUP BY d.InstallId
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 9) Rev Before / Period على مستوى القسط
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    RevBefore AS (
        SELECT d.InstallId, SUM(ISNULL(d.installValue,0)) AS RevBefore
        FROM RevBase d
        JOIN InstallmentsInRange ir ON ir.InstallId = d.InstallId
        WHERE @FromDate IS NOT NULL
          AND d.Installdate < @FromDate
        GROUP BY d.InstallId
    ),
    RevPeriod AS (
        SELECT d.InstallId, SUM(ISNULL(d.installValue,0)) AS RevPeriod
        FROM RevBase d
        JOIN InstallmentsInRange ir ON ir.InstallId = d.InstallId
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR d.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR d.Installdate < @ToDateEnd)
        GROUP BY d.InstallId
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- GLTotals (داخل الفترة)
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    GLTotals AS (
        SELECT
            SUM(CASE WHEN dv.Account_Code = b.a80 THEN dv.Value ELSE 0 END) AS RentDue_GL,
            SUM(CASE WHEN dv.Account_Code = b.a86 THEN dv.Value ELSE 0 END) AS Revenue_GL
        FROM dbo.notes n
        INNER JOIN dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS dv ON dv.Notes_ID = n.NoteID
        INNER JOIN dbo.branches b ON b.branch_id = n.branch_no
        WHERE n.NoteType = 57
          AND (@FromDate IS NULL OR n.NoteDate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR n.NoteDate < @ToDateEnd)
          AND (@BranchId IS NULL OR n.branch_no = @BranchId)
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- ✅ GLTotalsBefore (Opening+Before) نفس Debug بالظبط
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    BranchAcc AS (
        SELECT b.branch_id, b.a80 AS Account_Code, 80 AS AccKind
        FROM dbo.branches b
        WHERE (@BranchId IS NULL OR b.branch_id = @BranchId)

        UNION ALL

        SELECT b.branch_id, b.a86 AS Account_Code, 86 AS AccKind
        FROM dbo.branches b
        WHERE (@BranchId IS NULL OR b.branch_id = @BranchId)
    ),
    OpenV1 AS (
        SELECT v1.branch_id, v1.Account_Code,
               SUM(CASE WHEN v1.Credit_Or_Debit = 0 THEN v1.Value ELSE 0 END)
             - SUM(CASE WHEN v1.Credit_Or_Debit = 1 THEN v1.Value ELSE 0 END) AS OpeningFromV1
        FROM dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS1 v1
        WHERE v1.Posted IS NULL
        GROUP BY v1.branch_id, v1.Account_Code
    ),
    MoveBefore AS (
        SELECT v2.branch_id, v2.Account_Code,
               SUM(CASE WHEN v2.Credit_Or_Debit = 0 THEN v2.Value ELSE 0 END)
             - SUM(CASE WHEN v2.Credit_Or_Debit = 1 THEN v2.Value ELSE 0 END) AS MoveBefore
        FROM dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS v2
        WHERE v2.Posted IS NULL
          AND (@OpeningBalanceDate IS NOT NULL AND v2.RecordDate >= @OpeningBalanceDate)
          AND (@FromDateMinus1   IS NOT NULL AND v2.RecordDate <= @FromDateMinus1)
        GROUP BY v2.branch_id, v2.Account_Code
    ),
    GLTotalsBefore AS (
        SELECT
            SUM(CASE WHEN ba.AccKind = 80 THEN ISNULL(o.OpeningFromV1,0) + ISNULL(m.MoveBefore,0) ELSE 0 END) AS RentDue_GL_Before,
            SUM(CASE WHEN ba.AccKind = 86 THEN ISNULL(o.OpeningFromV1,0) + ISNULL(m.MoveBefore,0) ELSE 0 END) AS Revenue_GL_Before
        FROM BranchAcc ba
        LEFT JOIN OpenV1 o
            ON o.branch_id = ba.branch_id AND o.Account_Code = ba.Account_Code
        LEFT JOIN MoveBefore m
            ON m.branch_id = ba.branch_id AND m.Account_Code = ba.Account_Code
    )

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- النتيجة النهائية: صف واحد لكل قسط داخل الفترة
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    SELECT
        c.ContNo,
        c.NoteSerial1,

        i.Id AS InstallId,
        i.Installdate AS InstallDate,

        (ISNULL(i.installValue,0) - ISNULL(i.Insurance,0)) AS InstallNetValue,
        i.NoteSerial1H,

        ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) AS DueBefore,
        ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) AS RevenueBefore,
        ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) - ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) AS OpeningNet,

        ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0) AS DueInPeriod,
        ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0) AS RevenueInPeriod,
        ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0) - ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0) AS PeriodNet,

        (ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) + ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0)) AS DueToDate,
        (ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) + ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0)) AS RevenueToDate,
        (ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) + ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0))
          - (ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) + ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0)) AS ClosingNet,

        ia.TotalContract,

        c.ContDate,
        cu.CusName,
        cu.CusNamee,
        ow.CusName  AS OwnerName,
        ow.CusNamee AS OwnerNameE,
        br.branch_name,
        br.branch_namee,
        aq.aqarname,
        aqD.unitno,

        gl.RentDue_GL,
        gl.Revenue_GL,
        (ISNULL(gl.RentDue_GL,0) - ISNULL(gl.Revenue_GL,0)) AS GL_NetDifference,

        glb.RentDue_GL_Before,
        glb.Revenue_GL_Before,
        (ISNULL(glb.RentDue_GL_Before,0) - ISNULL(glb.Revenue_GL_Before,0)) AS GL_BeforeDifference

    FROM InstallmentsInRange ir
    JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i ON i.Id = ir.InstallId
    JOIN dbo.TblContract c ON c.ContNo = i.ContNo
    JOIN ContractsInRange cr ON cr.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN InstallAgg ia ON ia.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN DueBefore db  ON db.InstallId = i.Id
    LEFT JOIN DuePeriod dp  ON dp.InstallId = i.Id
    LEFT JOIN RevBefore rb  ON rb.InstallId = i.Id
    LEFT JOIN RevPeriod rp  ON rp.InstallId = i.Id
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblCustemers cu ON cu.CusID = c.CusID
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblAqar aq       ON aq.Aqarid = c.Iqar
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblAqarDetai aqD ON aqD.Id = c.UnitNo
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblCustemers ow  ON ow.CusID = aq.ownerid
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblBranchesData br ON br.branch_id = aq.BranchId
    CROSS JOIN GLTotals gl
    CROSS JOIN GLTotalsBefore glb
    WHERE 1=1
      AND (@BranchId   IS NULL OR aq.BranchId   = @BranchId)
      AND (@AqarTypeId IS NULL OR aq.Aqarid     = @AqarTypeId)
      AND (@ClientId   IS NULL OR c.CusID       = @ClientId)
      AND (@OwnerId    IS NULL OR aq.ownerid    = @OwnerId)
      AND (@ContractNo IS NULL OR c.ContNo      = @ContractNo)
    ORDER BY c.ContNo, i.Installdate, i.Id;
END

/* =========================================================
   Rpt_ContractRevenueSummary  (FIXED OpeningBalanceDate + GLTotalsBefore)
   ========================================================= */
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[Rpt_ContractRevenueSummary]
    @FromDate   DATETIME = NULL,
    @ToDate     DATETIME = NULL,
    @BranchId   INT      = NULL,
    @AqarTypeId INT      = NULL,
    @ClientId   INT      = NULL,
    @OwnerId    INT      = NULL,
    @ContractNo INT      = NULL
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @ToDateEnd DATETIME = CASE WHEN @ToDate IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE DATEADD(DAY,1,@ToDate) END;
    DECLARE @FromDateMinus1 DATETIME = CASE WHEN @FromDate IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE DATEADD(DAY,-1,@FromDate) END;

    /* ✅ FIX: OpeningBalanceDate = أول سنة بالنظام (IsFirstYear=1) + fallback */
    DECLARE @OpeningBalanceDate DATETIME =
    (
        SELECT MIN(datesatrt)
        FROM dbo.TblyearsData
        WHERE ISNULL(IsFirstYear,0) = 1
    );

    IF @OpeningBalanceDate IS NULL
        SELECT @OpeningBalanceDate = MIN(datesatrt) FROM dbo.TblyearsData;

    ;WITH
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 1) إجمالى قيمة العقد من الأقساط (Net بدون التأمين)
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    InstallAgg AS (
        SELECT ContNo,
               SUM(ISNULL(installValue,0) - ISNULL(Insurance,0)) AS TotalContract
        FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments
        GROUP BY ContNo
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 2) أول قسط لكل عقد (Fallback)
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    FirstInstallPerContract AS (
        SELECT ContNo, MIN(Installdate) AS FirstInstDate
        FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments
        GROUP BY ContNo
    ),
    FirstInstallFallback AS (
        SELECT
            c.ContNo,
            fi.Id AS InstallId,
            fi.Installdate,
            (ISNULL(fi.installValue,0) - ISNULL(fi.Insurance,0)) AS installValue
        FROM dbo.TblContract c
        JOIN FirstInstallPerContract fp ON fp.ContNo = c.ContNo
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments fi
             ON fi.ContNo = fp.ContNo
            AND fi.Installdate = fp.FirstInstDate
        LEFT JOIN dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails d ON d.InstallId = fi.Id
        WHERE ISNULL(c.NoteID,0) <> 0
          AND d.InstallId IS NULL
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 3) مصدر الاستحقاق (استحقاقات + Fallback)
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    DueBase AS (
        SELECT
            i.ContNo,
            d.InstallId,
            d.Installdate,
            (ISNULL(d.installValue,0) - ISNULL(d.Insurance,0)) AS installValue
        FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails d
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i ON d.InstallId = i.Id

        UNION ALL

        SELECT
            f.ContNo,
            f.InstallId,
            f.Installdate,
            f.installValue
        FROM FirstInstallFallback f
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 4) مصدر الإيراد (إثبات الإيراد)
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    RevBase AS (
        SELECT
            i.ContNo,
            d.Installid AS InstallId,
            d.Installdate,
            (ISNULL(d.installValue,0) - ISNULL(d.Insurance,0)) AS installValue
        FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails2 d
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i ON d.Installid = i.Id
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 5) الدفعات الصحيحة للمستحق (استحقاق أو Fallback)
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    ValidInstallments AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT InstallId FROM DueBase
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 6) العقود داخل نطاق التقرير
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    ContractsInRange AS (
        -- (أ) دفعات صالحة تاريخها الأصلي داخل الفترة
        SELECT DISTINCT i.ContNo
        FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments i
        JOIN ValidInstallments v ON v.InstallId = i.Id
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR i.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDate   IS NULL OR i.Installdate <= @ToDate)

        UNION

        -- (ب) من الإيرادات فقط
        SELECT DISTINCT r.ContNo
        FROM RevBase r
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR r.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR r.Installdate < @ToDateEnd)
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 7) مستحقات سابقة على مستوى العقد
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    DueBeforeContract AS (
        SELECT d.ContNo, SUM(ISNULL(d.installValue,0)) AS DueBefore
        FROM DueBase d
        JOIN ContractsInRange cr ON cr.ContNo = d.ContNo
        WHERE @FromDate IS NOT NULL
          AND d.Installdate < @FromDate
        GROUP BY d.ContNo
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 8) مستحقات خلال الفترة على مستوى العقد
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    DuePeriodContract AS (
        SELECT d.ContNo, SUM(ISNULL(d.installValue,0)) AS DuePeriod
        FROM DueBase d
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i ON i.Id = d.InstallId
        JOIN ContractsInRange cr ON cr.ContNo = d.ContNo
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR d.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR d.Installdate < @ToDateEnd)
          AND (@FromDate IS NULL OR i.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDate   IS NULL OR i.Installdate <= @ToDate)
        GROUP BY d.ContNo
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 9) إيرادات سابقة على مستوى العقد
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    RevBeforeContract AS (
        SELECT r.ContNo, SUM(ISNULL(r.installValue,0)) AS RevBefore
        FROM RevBase r
        JOIN ContractsInRange cr ON cr.ContNo = r.ContNo
        WHERE @FromDate IS NOT NULL
          AND r.Installdate < @FromDate
        GROUP BY r.ContNo
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 10) إيرادات خلال الفترة على مستوى العقد
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    RevPeriodContract AS (
        SELECT r.ContNo, SUM(ISNULL(r.installValue,0)) AS RevPeriod
        FROM RevBase r
        JOIN ContractsInRange cr ON cr.ContNo = r.ContNo
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR r.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR r.Installdate < @ToDateEnd)
        GROUP BY r.ContNo
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- GLTotals (داخل الفترة)
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    GLTotals AS (
        SELECT
            SUM(CASE WHEN dv.Account_Code = b.a80 THEN dv.Value ELSE 0 END) AS RentDue_GL,
            SUM(CASE WHEN dv.Account_Code = b.a86 THEN dv.Value ELSE 0 END) AS Revenue_GL
        FROM dbo.notes n
        INNER JOIN dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS dv ON dv.Notes_ID = n.NoteID
        INNER JOIN dbo.branches b ON b.branch_id = n.branch_no
        WHERE n.NoteType = 57
          AND (@FromDate IS NULL OR n.NoteDate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR n.NoteDate < @ToDateEnd)
          AND (@BranchId IS NULL OR n.branch_no = @BranchId)
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- ✅ GLTotalsBefore (Opening+Before)
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    BranchAcc AS (
        SELECT b.branch_id, b.a80 AS Account_Code, 80 AS AccKind
        FROM dbo.branches b
        WHERE (@BranchId IS NULL OR b.branch_id = @BranchId)

        UNION ALL

        SELECT b.branch_id, b.a86 AS Account_Code, 86 AS AccKind
        FROM dbo.branches b
        WHERE (@BranchId IS NULL OR b.branch_id = @BranchId)
    ),
    OpenV1 AS (
        SELECT v1.branch_id, v1.Account_Code,
               SUM(CASE WHEN v1.Credit_Or_Debit = 0 THEN v1.Value ELSE 0 END)
             - SUM(CASE WHEN v1.Credit_Or_Debit = 1 THEN v1.Value ELSE 0 END) AS OpeningFromV1
        FROM dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS1 v1
        WHERE v1.Posted IS NULL
        GROUP BY v1.branch_id, v1.Account_Code
    ),
    MoveBefore AS (
        SELECT v2.branch_id, v2.Account_Code,
               SUM(CASE WHEN v2.Credit_Or_Debit = 0 THEN v2.Value ELSE 0 END)
             - SUM(CASE WHEN v2.Credit_Or_Debit = 1 THEN v2.Value ELSE 0 END) AS MoveBefore
        FROM dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS v2
        WHERE v2.Posted IS NULL
          AND (@OpeningBalanceDate IS NOT NULL AND v2.RecordDate >= @OpeningBalanceDate)
          AND (@FromDateMinus1   IS NOT NULL AND v2.RecordDate <= @FromDateMinus1)
        GROUP BY v2.branch_id, v2.Account_Code
    ),
    GLTotalsBefore AS (
        SELECT
            SUM(CASE WHEN ba.AccKind = 80 THEN ISNULL(o.OpeningFromV1,0) + ISNULL(m.MoveBefore,0) ELSE 0 END) AS RentDue_GL_Before,
            SUM(CASE WHEN ba.AccKind = 86 THEN ISNULL(o.OpeningFromV1,0) + ISNULL(m.MoveBefore,0) ELSE 0 END) AS Revenue_GL_Before
        FROM BranchAcc ba
        LEFT JOIN OpenV1 o
            ON o.branch_id = ba.branch_id AND o.Account_Code = ba.Account_Code
        LEFT JOIN MoveBefore m
            ON m.branch_id = ba.branch_id AND m.Account_Code = ba.Account_Code
    )

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- النتيجة النهائية: سطر واحد لكل عقد
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    SELECT
        c.ContNo,
        c.NoteSerial1,

        ISNULL(ia.TotalContract,0) AS TotalContract,

        ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) AS DueBefore,
        ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) AS RevenueBefore,
        ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) - ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) AS OpeningNet,

        ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0) AS DueInPeriod,
        ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0) AS RevenueInPeriod,
        ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0) - ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0) AS PeriodNet,

        (ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) + ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0)) AS DueToDate,
        (ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) + ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0)) AS RevenueToDate,
        (ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) + ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0))
          - (ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) + ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0)) AS ClosingNet,

        c.ContDate,
        cu.CusName,
        cu.CusNamee,
        ow.CusName  AS OwnerName,
        ow.CusNamee AS OwnerNameE,
        br.branch_name,
        br.branch_namee,
        aq.aqarname,
        aqD.unitno,

        gl.RentDue_GL,
        gl.Revenue_GL,
        (ISNULL(gl.RentDue_GL,0) - ISNULL(gl.Revenue_GL,0)) AS GL_NetDifference,

        glb.RentDue_GL_Before,
        glb.Revenue_GL_Before,
        (ISNULL(glb.RentDue_GL_Before,0) - ISNULL(glb.Revenue_GL_Before,0)) AS GL_BeforeDifference

    FROM dbo.TblContract c
    JOIN ContractsInRange cr ON cr.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN InstallAgg ia           ON ia.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN DueBeforeContract db    ON db.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN DuePeriodContract dp    ON dp.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN RevBeforeContract rb    ON rb.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN RevPeriodContract rp    ON rp.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblCustemers cu     ON cu.CusID = c.CusID
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblAqar aq          ON aq.Aqarid = c.Iqar
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblAqarDetai aqD    ON aqD.Id = c.UnitNo
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblCustemers ow     ON ow.CusID = aq.ownerid
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblBranchesData br  ON br.branch_id = aq.BranchId
    CROSS JOIN GLTotals gl
    CROSS JOIN GLTotalsBefore glb
    WHERE 1=1
      AND (@BranchId   IS NULL OR aq.BranchId   = @BranchId)
      AND (@AqarTypeId IS NULL OR aq.Aqarid     = @AqarTypeId)
      AND (@ClientId   IS NULL OR c.CusID       = @ClientId)
      AND (@OwnerId    IS NULL OR aq.ownerid    = @OwnerId)
      AND (@ContractNo IS NULL OR c.ContNo      = @ContractNo)
    ORDER BY c.ContNo;
END

create PROCEDURE [dbo].[Rpt_ContractRevenueSummaryOld]
    @FromDate   DATETIME = NULL,
    @ToDate     DATETIME = NULL,
    @BranchId   INT      = NULL,
    @AqarTypeId INT      = NULL,
    @ClientId   INT      = NULL,
    @OwnerId    INT      = NULL,
    @ContractNo INT      = NULL
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    WITH InstallAgg AS (
        SELECT ContNo,
               SUM(ISNULL(installValue,0)) AS TotalContract
        FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments
        GROUP BY ContNo
    ),

    -- كل عقد له أى حركة فى الفترة فى أى من الجداول الثلاثة
    InstallInRange AS (
        -- أقساط فى الفترة
        SELECT DISTINCT ContNo
        FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDate   IS NULL OR Installdate < DATEADD(DAY,1,@ToDate))

        UNION

        -- مستحقات فى الفترة
        SELECT DISTINCT i.ContNo
        FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails d
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i ON d.InstallId = i.Id
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR d.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDate   IS NULL OR d.Installdate < DATEADD(DAY,1,@ToDate))

        UNION

        -- إيرادات فى الفترة
        SELECT DISTINCT i.ContNo
        FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails2 d2
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i ON d2.Installid = i.Id
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR d2.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDate   IS NULL OR d2.Installdate < DATEADD(DAY,1,@ToDate))
    ),

    RevenueAgg AS (
        SELECT  i.ContNo,
                SUM(ISNULL(d.installValue,0)) AS RevenueAmount
        FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails2 d
        INNER JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i
            ON d.Installid = i.id
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR d.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDate   IS NULL OR d.Installdate < DATEADD(DAY,1,@ToDate))
        GROUP BY i.ContNo
    ),

    DueAggTotal AS (
        SELECT i.ContNo,
               SUM(ISNULL(d.installValue,0)) AS TotalDue
        FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails d
        INNER JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i
            ON d.InstallId = i.id
        GROUP BY i.ContNo
    ),

    DueAggPeriod AS (
        SELECT i.ContNo,
               SUM(ISNULL(d.installValue,0)) AS PeriodDue
        FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails d
        INNER JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i
            ON d.InstallId = i.id
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR d.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDate   IS NULL OR d.Installdate < DATEADD(DAY,1,@ToDate))
        GROUP BY i.ContNo
    )

    SELECT
        c.ContNo,
        c.NoteSerial1,
        ISNULL(daP.PeriodDue,0)  AS DueInPeriod,
        ISNULL(daT.TotalDue,0)   AS TotalDue,
        ISNULL(ra.RevenueAmount,0) AS RevenueAmount,
        ISNULL(ia.TotalContract,0) AS ContractValue,
        ISNULL(daP.PeriodDue,0) - ISNULL(ra.RevenueAmount,0) AS Remaining,
        c.ContDate,
        cu.CusName,
        cu.CusNamee,
        ow.CusName  AS OwnerName,
        ow.CusNamee AS OwnerNameE,
        br.branch_name,
        br.branch_namee,
        aq.aqarname,
        aqD.unitno
    FROM dbo.TblContract c
        INNER JOIN InstallInRange ir ON c.ContNo = ir.ContNo
        LEFT JOIN InstallAgg      ia  ON c.ContNo = ia.ContNo
        LEFT JOIN RevenueAgg      ra  ON c.ContNo = ra.ContNo
        LEFT JOIN DueAggTotal     daT ON c.ContNo = daT.ContNo
        LEFT JOIN DueAggPeriod    daP ON c.ContNo = daP.ContNo
        LEFT JOIN dbo.TblCustemers cu ON c.CusID   = cu.CusID
        LEFT JOIN dbo.TblAqar      aq ON c.Iqar    = aq.Aqarid
        LEFT JOIN dbo.TblAqarDetai aqD ON c.UnitNo = aqD.Id
        LEFT JOIN dbo.TblCustemers ow ON aq.ownerid = ow.CusID
        LEFT JOIN dbo.TblBranchesData br ON aq.BranchId = br.branch_id
    WHERE 1 = 1
      AND (@BranchId   IS NULL OR aq.BranchId   = @BranchId)
      AND (@AqarTypeId IS NULL OR aq.aqartypeid = @AqarTypeId)
      AND (@ClientId   IS NULL OR c.CusID       = @ClientId)
      AND (@OwnerId    IS NULL OR aq.ownerid    = @OwnerId)
      AND (@ContractNo IS NULL OR c.ContNo      = @ContractNo)
    ORDER BY c.ContNo;
END

create PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_Get_AccountLedger_ReportData]
    @AccountCodes         NVARCHAR(MAX),      -- CSV
    @StartDate            DATE,
    @EndDate              DATE,
    @BranchID             INT         = 0,
    @ActivityId           INT         = 0,
    @RegionID             INT         = 0,
    @ProjectID            INT         = 0,
    @NotesType            FLOAT       = 0,
    @ShowHiddenInvoices   BIT         = 1,    -- 1=show hidden, 0=hide
    @IsDetailedReport     BIT         = 0,    -- 1=with item details
    @IncludeSeedRow       BIT         = 1,    -- (لن تُستخدم)
    @ComputeOpeningInSP   BIT         = 1,    -- (لن تُستخدم)
    @OpeningMode          TINYINT     = 1     -- (لن يُستخدم)
	,@Debug        BIT = 0,               -- يطبع بلوكات تشخيص
@DebugAccount NVARCHAR(50) = NULL    -- حساب للتركيز (اختياري)

AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    /* 0) حساب تاريخ الافتتاح: أقرب Opening <= @StartDate من TblyearsData */
 

    /* 1) قائمة الحسابات */
  IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Acc') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Acc;
CREATE TABLE #Acc (
  Account_Code NVARCHAR(50) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT PRIMARY KEY
);

INSERT INTO #Acc(Account_Code)
SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(Item)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
FROM dbo.fn_SplitString(@AccountCodes, N',');


    /* 2) كل بيانات التقرير من RptLedger_Sub (بدون فلتر التاريخ) */
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#BaseAll') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #BaseAll;
    SELECT
        R.Account_Code,
        R.RecordDate AS RecordDateX,
        CASE WHEN R.Credit_Or_Debit = 0 THEN R.DEV_Value ELSE -R.DEV_Value END AS ValueSigned,

        R.ChqueNum, R.ManualNo, R.RecordDateH, R.Double_Entry_Vouchers_ID,
        R.DEV_Value, R.Credit_Or_Debit, R.DEV_DES, R.DevDESE, R.Account_Name,
        R.DEV_ID_Line_No, R.NotesTypeName, R.UserID, R.UserName,
        R.ReceiptID, R.Notes_ID, R.OperaID, R.Transaction_ID, R.Transaction_Serial,
        R.Transaction_Date, R.Posted, R.TransactionTypeName, R.PostedDate, R.PostedUserID,
        R.Account_Interval_ID, R.NoteDate, R.NoteType, R.NoteSerial, R.Note_Value,
        R.Account_Serial, R.Account_NameEng, R.Parent_Account_Code, R.Branch,
        R.Sum_account, R.cost_center, R.currenct_code, R.Remark,
        R.note_value_by_characters, R.foxy_no, R.DEV_ID_Line_No1, R.project_id,
        R.NotesTypeNamee, R.TransactionEnglishName, R.opr_fullcode, R.NoteSerial1,
        R.branch_id, R.ActivityTypeId,

        A.opening_balance AS OB_Stored,
        A.opening_balance_type,

        R.notes_all, R.DEV_ValueE, R.currency, R.rate, R.Name, R.NameE,
        R.branch_name, R.branch_namee, R.RegionID, R.DescAccount
    INTO #BaseAll
    FROM dbo.RptLedger_Sub R
    JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS A ON A.Account_Code COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = R.Account_Code COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
WHERE R.Account_Code COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT IN (SELECT Account_Code FROM #Acc)
      AND (@ShowHiddenInvoices = 1 OR ISNULL(R.IsHiddenInv,0) = 0)
      AND (@BranchID   = 0 OR ISNULL(R.branch_id,0)      = @BranchID)
      AND (@ActivityId = 0 OR ISNULL(R.ActivityTypeId,0) = @ActivityId)
      AND (@RegionID   = 0 OR ISNULL(R.RegionID,0)       = @RegionID)
      AND (@ProjectID  = 0 OR ISNULL(R.project_id,0)     = @ProjectID)
      AND (@NotesType  = 0 OR ISNULL(R.NoteType,0)       = @NotesType);

    /* 3) الافتتاح: مباشرة من الجداول (بدون دوال) */
    -- 3.a) قيود الافتتاح في يوم @OBDate من جدول DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS1
 /* === 0) حدّد تاريخ الافتتاح من TblyearsData لنفس سنة التقرير === */

 /* ============== 3) افتتاح فعلي لكل حساب ============== */

/* أقدم تاريخ افتتاح عام قبل بداية الفترة (fallback) */
DECLARE @MinOB date =
(
    SELECT MIN(OpeneingbalancesDate)
    FROM dbo.TblyearsData
    WHERE OpeneingbalancesDate <= @StartDate
);
IF @MinOB IS NULL SET @MinOB = @StartDate;


/* لكل حساب: آخر تاريخ افتتاح فعلي في V1 <= @StartDate  */
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OB_DATE') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #OB_DATE;
SELECT
    A.Account_Code,
    OBDate = COALESCE( OA.OBDate, @MinOB )
INTO #OB_DATE
FROM #Acc X
JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS A
  ON A.Account_Code = X.Account_Code
OUTER APPLY
(
    SELECT MAX(V.RecordDate) AS OBDate
    FROM dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS1 V
    WHERE ( (A.last_account = 1 AND V.Account_Code = A.Account_Code)
         OR (A.last_account <> 1 AND V.Account_Code LIKE A.Account_Code + 'a%') )
      AND (V.Posted IS NULL OR V.Posted = 0)
      AND V.RecordDate <= @StartDate
) OA;
/* DEBUG 1: مبدئي */
IF @Debug = 1
BEGIN
  PRINT '=== DEBUG 1 ===';
  PRINT 'StartDate = ' + CONVERT(varchar(10), @StartDate, 120);
  PRINT 'EndDate   = ' + CONVERT(varchar(10), @EndDate, 120);
  PRINT 'MinOB     = ' + CONVERT(varchar(10), @MinOB, 120);

  -- كل حساب وتاريخ الافتتاح اللي اتلقط
  SELECT TOP (200) 'OB_DATE' AS dbg, Account_Code, OBDate
  FROM #OB_DATE
  ORDER BY Account_Code;

  -- لو حددت حساب، وريني القيود الافتتاحية الفعلية في اليوم ده
  IF @DebugAccount IS NOT NULL
  BEGIN
    SELECT 'V1 rows at OBDate' AS dbg, V.*
    FROM dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS1 V
    JOIN #OB_DATE D
      ON V.RecordDate = D.OBDate
     AND (V.Account_Code = @DebugAccount OR V.Account_Code LIKE @DebugAccount + 'a%')
    WHERE D.Account_Code = @DebugAccount;
  END
END

/* رصيد الافتتاح من جدول الافتتاحيات في يوم OBDate لكل حساب */
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OB_OPEN') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #OB_OPEN;
SELECT
    D.Account_Code,
    OpeningFromOB = ISNULL(
        SUM(CASE WHEN V.Credit_Or_Debit = 0 THEN V.value ELSE -V.value END), 0
    )
INTO #OB_OPEN
FROM #OB_DATE D
JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS A
  ON A.Account_Code = D.Account_Code
LEFT JOIN dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS1 V
  ON V.RecordDate = D.OBDate
 AND ( (A.last_account = 1 AND V.Account_Code = A.Account_Code)
    OR (A.last_account <> 1 AND V.Account_Code LIKE A.Account_Code + 'a%') )
 AND (V.Posted IS NULL OR V.Posted = 0)
GROUP BY D.Account_Code;

/* حركة من بعد OBDate ولحد قبل StartDate */
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OB_MOV') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #OB_MOV;
SELECT
    D.Account_Code,
    OpeningFromMoves = ISNULL(
        SUM(CASE WHEN R.Credit_Or_Debit = 0 THEN R.DEV_Value ELSE -R.DEV_Value END), 0
    )
INTO #OB_MOV
FROM #OB_DATE D
JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS A
  ON A.Account_Code = D.Account_Code
LEFT JOIN dbo.RptLedger_Sub R
  ON R.RecordDate > D.OBDate    -- بعد قيد الافتتاح
 AND R.RecordDate < @StartDate  -- قبل بداية الفترة
 AND ( (A.last_account = 1 AND R.Account_Code = A.Account_Code)
    OR (A.last_account <> 1 AND R.Account_Code LIKE A.Account_Code + 'a%') )
 AND (@ShowHiddenInvoices = 1 OR ISNULL(R.IsHiddenInv,0) = 0)
 AND (@BranchID   = 0 OR ISNULL(R.branch_id,0)      = @BranchID)
 AND (@ActivityId = 0 OR ISNULL(R.ActivityTypeId,0) = @ActivityId)
 AND (@RegionID   = 0 OR ISNULL(R.RegionID,0)       = @RegionID)
 AND (@ProjectID  = 0 OR ISNULL(R.project_id,0)     = @ProjectID)
 AND (@NotesType  = 0 OR ISNULL(R.NoteType,0)       = @NotesType)
GROUP BY D.Account_Code;
/* DEBUG 2: الافتتاح + الحركة قبل الفترة */
IF @Debug = 1
BEGIN
  PRINT '=== DEBUG 2 ===';

  SELECT TOP (200) 'OB_OPEN' AS dbg, * FROM #OB_OPEN ORDER BY Account_Code;
  SELECT TOP (200) 'OB_MOV'  AS dbg, * FROM #OB_MOV  ORDER BY Account_Code;

  IF @DebugAccount IS NOT NULL
  BEGIN
    -- تفاصيل الحركة قبل الفترة للحساب المحدد
    SELECT 'Moves before StartDate' AS dbg, R.*
    FROM dbo.RptLedger_Sub R
    WHERE R.RecordDate >
            (SELECT OBDate FROM #OB_DATE WHERE Account_Code = @DebugAccount)
      AND R.RecordDate < @StartDate
      AND (R.Account_Code = @DebugAccount OR R.Account_Code LIKE @DebugAccount + 'a%');
  END
END

/* الرصيد الافتتاحي النهائي لكل حساب = افتتاح + حركة قبل الفترة */
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OB') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #OB;
SELECT
    A.Account_Code,
    OpeningBalance = ISNULL(O1.OpeningFromOB,0) + ISNULL(O2.OpeningFromMoves,0)
INTO #OB
FROM #Acc X
JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS A ON A.Account_Code = X.Account_Code
LEFT JOIN #OB_OPEN O1 ON O1.Account_Code = A.Account_Code
LEFT JOIN #OB_MOV  O2 ON O2.Account_Code = A.Account_Code;
/* DEBUG 3: الرصيد الافتتاحي النهائي */
IF @Debug = 1
BEGIN
  PRINT '=== DEBUG 3 ===';
  SELECT TOP (200) 'OB_FINAL' AS dbg, * FROM #OB ORDER BY Account_Code;

  IF @DebugAccount IS NOT NULL
  BEGIN
    SELECT 'OB of DebugAccount' AS dbg, * FROM #OB WHERE Account_Code = @DebugAccount;
  END
END


    /* 4) حركات الفترة فقط */
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#InRange') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #InRange;
    SELECT *
    INTO #InRange
    FROM #BaseAll
    WHERE RecordDateX IS NULL
       OR (RecordDateX >= @StartDate AND RecordDateX <= @EndDate);

    /* 5) جدول الإخراج النهائي (شكل ثابت) */
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Main') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Main;
    CREATE TABLE #Main
    (
        ChqueNum NVARCHAR(50) NULL,
        ManualNo NVARCHAR(50) NULL,
        RecordDateH NVARCHAR(50) NULL,
        Double_Entry_Vouchers_ID INT NULL,
        DEV_Value FLOAT NULL,
        Credit_Or_Debit SMALLINT NULL,
        Account_Code NVARCHAR(50) NULL,
        DEV_DES NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL,

    --/* 6) سطر "رصيد سابق" — إلزامي لكل حساب */

    --    Item_ID, ShowQty, showPrice, Transaction_Type, StockEffect, ItemCode, ItemName, ItemNamee,
    --    UnitId, UnitName, UnitNamee, discountvalue,
    --    OpeningBalance
    --)
    --SELECT
    --    NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,
    --    -- نوزّع الرصيد على طرف واحد (مدين/دائن) حسب الإشارة

    --    A.Account_Code,
    --    N'رصيد سابق حتى ' + CONVERT(NVARCHAR(10), @StartDate, 120),

    --    A.Account_Name,

    --    NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,
    --    NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,
    --    NULL, NULL, NULL,
    --    A.opening_balance, A.opening_balance_type, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,
    --    NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,
    --    NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,
    --    NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,
    --    OB.OpeningBalance
    --FROM #Acc X
    --JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS A ON A.Account_Code = X.Account_Code
    --LEFT JOIN #OB OB ON OB.Account_Code = A.Account_Code;

    /* 7) حركات الفترة */
    INSERT INTO #Main (
        ChqueNum,ManualNo,RecordDateH,Double_Entry_Vouchers_ID,DEV_Value,Credit_Or_Debit,

    )
    SELECT
        B.ChqueNum,B.ManualNo,B.RecordDateH,B.Double_Entry_Vouchers_ID,B.DEV_Value,B.Credit_Or_Debit,
