        B.UserID,B.UserName,B.RecordDateX,B.ReceiptID,B.Notes_ID,B.OperaID,
        B.Transaction_ID,B.Transaction_Serial,B.Transaction_Date,B.Posted,B.TransactionTypeName,
        B.PostedDate,B.PostedUserID,B.Account_Interval_ID,B.NoteDate,B.NoteType,
        LTRIM(STR(B.NoteSerial, 38, 0)) AS NoteSerial,B.Note_Value,
        B.Account_Serial,B.Account_NameEng,B.Parent_Account_Code,B.Branch,B.Sum_account,B.cost_center,
        B.currenct_code,B.Remark,B.note_value_by_characters,B.foxy_no,B.DEV_ID_Line_No1,B.project_id,
        B.NotesTypeNamee,B.TransactionEnglishName,B.opr_fullcode,
        LTRIM(STR(B.NoteSerial1, 38, 0)) AS NoteSerial1,B.branch_id,B.ActivityTypeId,
        B.OB_Stored,B.opening_balance_type,B.notes_all,B.DEV_ValueE,B.currency,B.rate,B.Name,B.NameE,
        B.branch_name,B.branch_namee,B.RegionID,B.DescAccount,
        C.CusNamee,C.CusName,E.Emp_Name,E.Emp_Namee,
        (SELECT TOP(1) Emp_Code FROM dbo.TblEmployee EE
         WHERE B.Account_Code IN (ISNULL(EE.Account_code,''),ISNULL(EE.Account_code1,''),ISNULL(EE.Account_code2,''),
                                  ISNULL(EE.Account_code3,''),ISNULL(EE.Account_code4,''),ISNULL(EE.Account_code5,''))),
        CASE WHEN @IsDetailedReport=1 THEN TD.Item_ID END,
        CASE WHEN @IsDetailedReport=1 THEN TD.ShowQty END,
        CASE WHEN @IsDetailedReport=1 THEN TD.showPrice END,
        CASE WHEN @IsDetailedReport=1 THEN TT.Transaction_Type END,
        CASE WHEN @IsDetailedReport=1 THEN TT.StockEffect END,
        CASE WHEN @IsDetailedReport=1 THEN Itm.ItemCode END,
        CASE WHEN @IsDetailedReport=1 THEN Itm.ItemName END,
        CASE WHEN @IsDetailedReport=1 THEN Itm.ItemNamee END,
        CASE WHEN @IsDetailedReport=1 THEN TD.UnitId END,
        CASE WHEN @IsDetailedReport=1 THEN U.UnitName END,
        CASE WHEN @IsDetailedReport=1 THEN U.UnitNamee END,
        CASE WHEN @IsDetailedReport=1 THEN TD.discountvalue END,
        COALESCE(OB.OpeningBalance, B.OB_Stored, 0) AS OpeningBalance
    FROM #InRange B
    LEFT JOIN #OB OB ON OB.Account_Code = B.Account_Code
    LEFT JOIN dbo.Transactions TR   ON TR.Transaction_ID = B.Transaction_ID
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblCustemers C    ON C.CusID = TR.CusID
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblEmployee  E    ON E.Account_Code = B.Account_Code
    LEFT JOIN dbo.Transaction_Details TD ON (@IsDetailedReport=1 AND TD.Transaction_ID = B.Transaction_ID)
    LEFT JOIN dbo.Transactions        TR2 ON (@IsDetailedReport=1 AND TR2.Transaction_ID = B.Transaction_ID)
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TransactionTypes    TT  ON (@IsDetailedReport=1 AND TT.Transaction_Type = TR2.Transaction_Type)
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblItems            Itm ON (@IsDetailedReport=1 AND Itm.ItemID = TD.Item_ID)
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblUnites           U   ON (@IsDetailedReport=1 AND U.UnitID   = TD.UnitId);

    /* 8) إخراج مرتّب: السطر الافتتاحي يطلع أول حاجة لكل حساب */
    SELECT *
    FROM #Main
    ORDER BY
        Account_Code,
        RecordDate,
        CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(NoteSerial1) = 1 THEN CAST(NoteSerial1 AS BIGINT) ELSE 0 END,
        DEV_ID_Line_No;

    /* تنظيف */
    DROP TABLE #Main;
    DROP TABLE #InRange;
    DROP TABLE #OB;
    --DROP TABLE #MOVES;
    --DROP TABLE #OB_ONLY;
    DROP TABLE #BaseAll;
    DROP TABLE #Acc;
END

CREATE PROCEDURE sp_GetBranchQRInfo
    @BranchID INT
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    SELECT
        BB.branch_namee,
        ActivityName = 
            CASE 
                WHEN NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(TA.namee)), '') IS NOT NULL 
                THEN TA.namee 
                ELSE BB.branch_namee 
            END,
        VATRegNo = 
            CASE 
                WHEN NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(TA.VATRegNo)), '') IS NOT NULL 
                THEN TA.VATRegNo 
                ELSE BB.VATRegNo 
            END
    FROM 
        TblBranchesData AS BB
        LEFT JOIN tblActivitesType AS TA ON TA.id = BB.ActivityTypeId
    WHERE 
        BB.branch_id = @BranchID;
END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_FullDbMaintenance
(
      @RebuildThreshold   FLOAT = 30    -- لو الفراجمنتشن >= القيمة دي: REBUILD
    , @ReorganizeFrom     FLOAT = 5     -- من القيمة دي لحد الحد الأعلى: REORGANIZE
    , @MinPageCount       INT   = 100   -- تجاهل الإندكسات الصغيرة أقل من كذا صفحة
    , @TopMissingIndexes  INT   = 50    -- عدد صفوف ريبورت الـ Missing Indexes
    , @TopQueries         INT   = 20    -- عدد صفوف ريبورت الـ Top Queries
)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    PRINT '===============================================';
    PRINT 'بدء صيانة الداتا بيز: ' + DB_NAME();
    PRINT 'التاريخ/الوقت: ' + CONVERT(NVARCHAR(30), GETDATE(), 120);
    PRINT '===============================================';

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 1) صيانة الإندكسات (Rebuild / Reorganize)
    ------------------------------------------------
    PRINT 'الخطوة 1: حساب الفراجمنتشن وصيانة الإندكسات...';

    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Frag') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Frag;

    SELECT 
          t.name      AS TableName
        , s.name      AS SchemaName
        , i.name      AS IndexName
        , ips.index_id
        , ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent AS FragPercent
        , ips.page_count
    INTO #Frag
    FROM sys.dm_db_index_physical_stats(DB_ID(), NULL, NULL, NULL, 'SAMPLED') ips
    JOIN sys.indexes i   ON ips.object_id = i.object_id AND ips.index_id = i.index_id
    JOIN sys.tables t    ON t.object_id  = i.object_id
    JOIN sys.schemas s   ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id
    WHERE 
        i.type IN (1,2)              -- clustered, nonclustered
        AND ips.page_count >= @MinPageCount
        AND t.is_ms_shipped = 0;

    DECLARE 
          @TableName   SYSNAME
        , @SchemaName  SYSNAME
        , @IndexName   SYSNAME
        , @IndexId     INT
        , @Frag        FLOAT
        , @SQL         NVARCHAR(MAX);

    DECLARE curIndexes CURSOR LOCAL FAST_FORWARD FOR
        SELECT TableName, SchemaName, IndexName, index_id, FragPercent
        FROM #Frag
        WHERE FragPercent >= @ReorganizeFrom
        ORDER BY FragPercent DESC;

    OPEN curIndexes;
    FETCH NEXT FROM curIndexes INTO @TableName, @SchemaName, @IndexName, @IndexId, @Frag;

    WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
    BEGIN
        IF @Frag >= @RebuildThreshold
        BEGIN
            -- REBUILD
            SET @SQL = N'ALTER INDEX [' + @IndexName + N'] ON [' + @SchemaName + N'].[' + @TableName + N'] REBUILD;';
        END
        ELSE
        BEGIN
            -- REORGANIZE
            SET @SQL = N'ALTER INDEX [' + @IndexName + N'] ON [' + @SchemaName + N'].[' + @TableName + N'] REORGANIZE;';
        END

        PRINT @SQL;

        BEGIN TRY
            EXEC (@SQL);
        END TRY
        BEGIN CATCH
            PRINT 'خطأ أثناء صيانة الإندكس: ' 
                  + ISNULL(@SchemaName,'') + '.' + ISNULL(@TableName,'') 
                  + ' - ' + ISNULL(@IndexName,'')
                  + ' => ' + ERROR_MESSAGE();
        END CATCH;

        FETCH NEXT FROM curIndexes INTO @TableName, @SchemaName, @IndexName, @IndexId, @Frag;
    END

    CLOSE curIndexes;
    DEALLOCATE curIndexes;

    PRINT 'انتهاء خطوة صيانة الإندكسات.';
    PRINT '-----------------------------------------------';

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 2) تحديث الإحصائيات UPDATE STATISTICS
    ------------------------------------------------
    PRINT 'الخطوة 2: تحديث الإحصائيات لكل الجداول...';

    DECLARE @FullTableName SYSNAME;

    DECLARE curTables CURSOR LOCAL FAST_FORWARD FOR
        SELECT QUOTENAME(s.name) + '.' + QUOTENAME(t.name)
        FROM sys.tables t
        JOIN sys.schemas s ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id
        WHERE t.is_ms_shipped = 0;

    OPEN curTables;
    FETCH NEXT FROM curTables INTO @FullTableName;

    WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
    BEGIN
        SET @SQL = N'UPDATE STATISTICS ' + @FullTableName + ' WITH FULLSCAN;';
        PRINT @SQL;

        BEGIN TRY
            EXEC (@SQL);
        END TRY
        BEGIN CATCH
            PRINT 'خطأ أثناء تحديث الإحصائيات للجدول: ' 
                  + @FullTableName + ' => ' + ERROR_MESSAGE();
        END CATCH;

        FETCH NEXT FROM curTables INTO @FullTableName;
    END

    CLOSE curTables;
    DEALLOCATE curTables;

    PRINT 'انتهاء خطوة تحديث الإحصائيات.';
    PRINT '-----------------------------------------------';

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 3) ريبورت الاقتراحات: Missing Indexes
    ------------------------------------------------
    PRINT 'الخطوة 3: عرض اقتراحات الإندكسات الناقصة (Missing Indexes)...';

    SELECT TOP (@TopMissingIndexes)
          DatabaseName      = DB_NAME(mid.database_id)
        , SchemaName       = OBJECT_SCHEMA_NAME(mid.object_id, mid.database_id)
        , TableName        = OBJECT_NAME(mid.object_id, mid.database_id)
        , TotalReads       = (migs.user_seeks + migs.user_scans)
        , ImprovementEstimate = migs.avg_total_user_cost * (migs.user_seeks + migs.user_scans)
        , mid.equality_columns
        , mid.inequality_columns
        , mid.included_columns
        , CreateIndexStatement =
            'CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_Auto_' 
            + REPLACE(OBJECT_NAME(mid.object_id, mid.database_id), ' ', '_')
            + '_' + CAST(migs.group_handle AS VARCHAR(10))
            + ' ON [' + OBJECT_SCHEMA_NAME(mid.object_id, mid.database_id) + '].['
            + OBJECT_NAME(mid.object_id, mid.database_id) + ']'
            + ' (' 
                + ISNULL(mid.equality_columns,'')
                + CASE 
                    WHEN mid.equality_columns IS NOT NULL 
                         AND mid.inequality_columns IS NOT NULL 
                    THEN ',' ELSE '' END
                + ISNULL(mid.inequality_columns,'')
              + ')'
            + CASE 
                WHEN mid.included_columns IS NOT NULL 
                THEN ' INCLUDE (' + mid.included_columns + ')' 
                ELSE '' 
              END
    FROM sys.dm_db_missing_index_group_stats AS migs
    JOIN sys.dm_db_missing_index_groups       AS mig  ON migs.group_handle = mig.index_group_handle
    JOIN sys.dm_db_missing_index_details      AS mid  ON mig.index_handle  = mid.index_handle
    WHERE mid.database_id = DB_ID()
    ORDER BY ImprovementEstimate DESC;

    PRINT 'انتهاء ريبورت Missing Indexes.';
    PRINT '-----------------------------------------------';

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 4) ريبورت الإندكسات غير المستخدمة (مرشحة للمراجعة)
    ------------------------------------------------
    PRINT 'الخطوة 4: عرض الإندكسات غير المستخدمة تقريبًا...';

    ;WITH IndexUsage AS
    (
        SELECT 
              SchemaName   = s.name
            , TableName    = t.name
            , IndexName    = i.name
            , i.index_id
            , i.is_primary_key
            , i.is_unique
            , user_seeks   = COALESCE(us.user_seeks,0)
            , user_scans   = COALESCE(us.user_scans,0)
            , user_lookups = COALESCE(us.user_lookups,0)
            , user_updates = COALESCE(us.user_updates,0)
            , total_reads  = COALESCE(us.user_seeks,0)
                            + COALESCE(us.user_scans,0)
                            + COALESCE(us.user_lookups,0)
        FROM sys.indexes i
        JOIN sys.tables t   ON t.object_id = i.object_id
        JOIN sys.schemas s  ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id
        LEFT JOIN sys.dm_db_index_usage_stats us
            ON us.object_id = i.object_id
           AND us.index_id  = i.index_id
           AND us.database_id = DB_ID()
        WHERE 
            t.is_ms_shipped = 0
            AND i.type_desc <> 'HEAP'
    )
    SELECT 
          SchemaName
        , TableName
        , IndexName
        , user_seeks
        , user_scans
        , user_lookups
        , user_updates
        , total_reads
    FROM IndexUsage
    WHERE 
        total_reads = 0    -- مفيش قراءات تقريبًا
        AND user_updates > 0
        AND is_primary_key = 0
        AND is_unique      = 0
    ORDER BY user_updates DESC;

    PRINT 'انتهاء ريبورت الإندكسات غير المستخدمة.';
    PRINT '-----------------------------------------------';

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 5) ريبورت الاستعلامات التقيلة (Top Expensive Queries)
    ------------------------------------------------
    PRINT 'الخطوة 5: عرض أكثر الاستعلامات تكلفة...';

    SELECT TOP (@TopQueries)
          AvgDuration_ms   = qs.total_elapsed_time / qs.execution_count
        , qs.execution_count
        , AvgLogicalReads  = qs.total_logical_reads / qs.execution_count
        , AvgCPU           = qs.total_worker_time / qs.execution_count
        , DatabaseName     = DB_NAME(st.dbid)
        , SchemaName       = OBJECT_SCHEMA_NAME(st.objectid, st.dbid)
        , ObjectName       = OBJECT_NAME(st.objectid, st.dbid)
        , QueryText        = SUBSTRING(
                                st.text,
                                (qs.statement_start_offset/2)+1,
                                ((CASE qs.statement_end_offset
                                    WHEN -1 THEN DATALENGTH(st.text)
                                    ELSE qs.statement_end_offset
                                  END - qs.statement_start_offset)/2)+1
                             )
    FROM sys.dm_exec_query_stats qs
    CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(qs.sql_handle) st
    WHERE DB_NAME(st.dbid) = DB_NAME()
    ORDER BY AvgDuration_ms DESC;

    PRINT 'انتهاء ريبورت Top Queries.';
    PRINT '===============================================';
    PRINT 'انتهاء ستورد بروسيجر الصيانة الكاملة للداتا بيز.';
    PRINT '===============================================';

END
